case_title: ESWAY VALERIE J VS CHAPMAN BRUCE AND SHEILA DBA IT'S TOPS COFFEE SHOP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY ESWAY VALERIE J AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPMAN BRUCE AND SHEILA DBA IT'S TOPS COFFEE SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESWAY VALERIE J IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAPMAN BRUCE AND SHEILA DBA IT'S TOPS COFFEE SHOP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
